arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy to be named new Leicester manager after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to be named the new Leicester City boss as the Foxes act quick to replace Steve Cooper and will hand the Dutchman the reigns after he left Manchester United

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Bodo/Glimt injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Manchester United and Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti breaks Sir Alex Ferguson Champions League record against Liverpool
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is taking charge of his 215th Champions League match tonight, passing former Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim addresses calls for Man Utd to sign new striker
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has pushed back on suggestions that Manchester United need to sign a new striker to address a lack of goals so far this season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United criticised over ‘offensive’ price increase for match tickets
arts.sum: United and Everton fans are set to stage a protest against ticket prices ahead of their Premier League clash on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand fires warning to Ruben Amorim after Man Utd target leaves him unimpressed
arts.sum: Manchester United have been heavily linked with Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres since Ruben Amorim left the Portuguese champions to take up a new role at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Manchester United receive fresh Ruben Amorim confirmation after Erik ten Hag comparison
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim will have watched in horror as his former team Sporting were thrashed by Arsenal in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'have three-man left-back shortlist' with January deal 'possible'
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers' Rayan Ait-Nouri, Chelsea's Ben Chilwell and Benfica's Alvaro Fernandez are allegedly left-back options for Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man United injury update: Is Leny Yoro available for selection?
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim reveals that teenage centre-back Leny Yoro is still not being considered for selection.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans plan protest over ticket price hike
arts.sum: Fans will join with Everton supporters outside Old Trafford as part of the ‘Stop Exploiting Loyalty campaign’
